task.title: Run a Migration Job
task.shortdesc: Run the full pipeline with run, then review execution artifacts before and after apply mode.

prereq.p: Have a source package directory and a writable target directory.
For first-time onboarding, run this task against a non-production package and keep dry-run and apply reports in separate files.

step.cmd: Run the full pipeline in dry-run mode first.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor run \ --package /path/to/package \ --docx-stem OutputDoc \ --target build/job-001 \ --report build/job-001/execution-report-dry.json

step.cmd: Inspect dry-run summary and discovery context.
Run apply mode only after dry-run results match your expectation.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor run \ --package /path/to/package \ --docx-stem OutputDoc \ --target build/job-001 \ --apply \ --report build/job-001/execution-report-apply.json

step.cmd: Inspect apply report for failures and timing.

info.codeblock: jq '{started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, summary}' build/job-001/execution-report-apply.json jq '.results[] | select(.status=="failed")' build/job-001/execution-report-apply.json

result.p: You produce a target package output and an audit trail for discovery context, action outcomes, and execution timing.
result.codeblock: execution-report-dry.json: dry_run=true, summary.skipped=summary.total execution-report-apply.json: dry_run=false, summary.failed=0
